Package i5.cb.graph

Class DiagramDesktopGLayouter

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.graph.DiagramDesktopGLayouter

  • public class DiagramDesktopGLayouter
extends java.lang.Object
    This class is responsible for calculating the layout of the graph. Incremental updating is supported. This class depends on "grappa" library. It uses grappa's graph data structure to store and manipulate the underline graph on the DiagramDestop.

    • Field Summary
